name: @radzor/sms-send
description: SMS sending via Twilio or Vonage APIs. Supports single and batch messages, delivery status tracking, and webhook-based delivery receipts.

inputs.name: accountSid
inputs.description: Twilio Account SID or Vonage API Key.

inputs.name: authToken
inputs.description: Twilio Auth Token or Vonage API Secret.

inputs.name: fromNumber
inputs.description: Sender phone number in E.164 format (+1234567890).

outputs.name: sendResult
outputs.description: Result with message SID, status, and provider response.

events.name: onSent
events.description: Fired when an SMS is sent.

params.name: to
params.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format.

params.name: body
params.description: SMS message body (max 1600 chars for Twilio).

llm.constraints: Requires Twilio or Vonage account. Phone numbers must be in E.164 format. Content/rate limits apply per provider.
